message:
feat(ci,tests): expand WASM QA evidence matrix and transport frontier benchmark suite

Add comprehensive test coverage for the WASM browser edition launch
readiness pipeline. New test files cover the GA go/no-go evidence
packet, readiness review board checklist, launch rollout stabilization
criteria, and the full QA evidence matrix contract — each with
deterministic assertions against the contract specifications.

Transport frontier benchmark contract tests are extended with new
multi-mode scenarios covering wavefront pipeline integration and
RaptorQ track-F artifact validation.

CI and infrastructure:
- CI matrix policy updated with WASM target tier definitions
- ci.yml workflow expanded for cross-platform WASM smoke runs
- Browser-core ABI export tests added for wasm32 target validation
- Benchmark smoke scripts hardened with exit-on-error and artifact checks
- Beads issue tracker state synced

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
